name: Taco Compuesto
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Green chili peppers, diced - canned
1 cup Low-cal processed cheese or Part-skim mozzarella cheese - shredded for either a mixture of both
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, cook ground beef, chopped onions, green chili pepper; and minced garlic over medium heat until beef is brown. Drain off fat.
2. Stir in chili powder.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine chopped tomato, Italian salad dressing, and seasoned salt (salt is salt no matter what).
4. Spoon the beef mixture into taco shells.
5. Top with tomato mixture, shredded lettuce, shredded cheese, and taco sauce.
6. Makes 4 servings. Time: 20 minutes.
